title: Fierce Storm Wrecks Ships at Gibraltar

title: Ernst Mach: The Scientist Behind Supersonic Speed
story: Zoom! A plane breaks the sound barrier. The scientist who helped us understand this was born on February 18, 1838. Ernst Mach, an Austrian genius, studied shock waves and gave us the Mach number. This measures how fast something moves compared to the speed of sound. Mach was more than just a physicist - he was also a deep thinker in philosophy and psychology.

title: The Soldier with Four Nationalities
story: Charles Kuentz was born in 1897 in Ranspach, Alsace. This World War I veteran experienced a unique twist of fate.
